titleStmt.title: SII 8.446: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 446. (A.R. No. 157-A of 1903). ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vanacakkra vattikaḷ coṇāṭu parān=ta kavaḷanāṭṭu māṟamaṅkalamāṉa deve turvvedi maṅkala
ttu sabh Aiyom Ivvūr śrīkaiyilāsamuṭaiyaār candraśekha raīśva ramuṭaiyārk vūr śrīpuṇḍravarddha nattu śva raṉ kecavaṉ Eḻun=ta ruḷu mutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikku veṇṭum nitta niman=ta ttukku caṇṭeśva ravilaiyāka m paṇṇikkuṭutta pū
tu . Ivvūr melvayal puḷiṅkaḷakkaṭṭaḷaiyil Āḷavan=ta vacakkalukku Ellaiyāvatu lai veṇṇaikkūtta viḷākattukku meṟkum teṉṉellai paṭṭavṛ ttikku vaṭa lellai nāya ṉār devadā ṉam Āyiratteṇmavacakkalukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai kālukku teṟkum Āka Innāṉkellai
peṟṟa neṟṟikku meṟkum teṉṉellai taṇporun=ta Āṟṟukku vaṭakkum melellai �yakavacakkalukkum narasiṁ hatevar paṟṟu kuṭuttu mukamaḻakiyapāṇṭiya kum vaṭavellai kālukkut teṟkum Ināṉkellaik kuḷppaṭṭa nilamum cuṟṟu nālukaraiyum tirunan=ta vanamākavu Iṭṭukkoḷvatāka
nte ruvil kiḻmatiḻ peṟṟa neṟṟikku meṟkum teṉṉellai teruvukku vaṭakkum meṟkum kiḻakkuniṉṟu ponta mekkuteruvukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai kālukku teṟkum Āka Inila n=ta maikku tiruvirāmiśva raṉ kecavaṉ tāṉe Inni laṅkaḷum tirunan=ta vaṉamum kallit tiruttavum nāṅkaḷ Iṟaii
koṇṭa poru(ḷ)ḷum Uḷpaṭa Accu 6 10 9 Ivvaccu Aṟupattoṉpatuk kum Innilam caṇṭeśva ravilaiyāka Innilam dā ṉampaṇṇik kuṭutta Innilaṅkaḷukku nālāntarattiṉpaṭi kaṭamai Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum māvi liñcu ṉam poruḷum ciṟaikarai ceññīrveṭṭiyu maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉa nāṅkaḷe cantrāditya vaṟ I kkuṭuppomākavum kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatāka sammatittu pra māṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahā
sabh Aiyom . Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr puruṣottamaṉ cen=tā- maraikkaṇṇaṉāṉa vaṇṭuvarāpatinampi Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku śrīpuṇḍavaddhana- ttu tiruvirāmiśva raṉ kecavaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku śrīpokalūr colaiyaraicu periyanampi Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku śrīpokalūr kūttaṉ Eṟu tiruuṭaiyāṉāṉa tillaimuvāyira nampi Eḻuttu . Ippa kkattu somaṉātaṉ karumāṇikkamāraṉ tirucciṟṟampalanampi Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr kū
ttaṉ kecavapaṭṭaṉāṉa ceranārāyaṇa brahmā tarājaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku mahārājamaṅkalattu [udaya] māl mātavaṉāna cuntarapperumāḷnampi Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku śrīpokalūr kūttaṉ colaiaraicu Āṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya brahmā tarā jaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku ttu somanātaṉ Aḻakaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku śrīpokalūr kūttaṉ śrīkulacekara bra Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr puruṣottamaṉ colaippirānāṉa Avaninārāyaṇa brahmā tarājaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku śrīpoka
lūr cikaiyilāsamuṭaiyāṉ citaraṉāṉa Atijayapāṇṭiya brahmādirā jaṉ Eḻuttu . śrīpuṇṭavarddha nattu cuntarattoḷuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaṇaiaṭaittāṉ Eḻuttu . śrīpokalūr colaiaraicu kūttaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku śrīpokalūr vikra mapāṇṭiya Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpokalūr Iḷaiyakūttaṉ mātavaṉ Eḻuttu . mārājamaṅkala
Utaiyamāl Eḻuttu . Iṟaivāṉaraicūr veṇṇaikkūttaṉ colaiaraiciṉ Eḻuttu śrīpuṇṭavarddha nattu Utaiyamāl tiruvirāmiśa raṉ Eḻuttu . śrīpokalūr celvappirāṉ citaraṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpuṇḍavarddha nattu Utaiyamāl tiruvi Eḻuttu . Ivai tirukkaṭamukkattu comaṉātaṉ tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruvara
ṅkapperumāḷnampi Eḻuttu . Ivai Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr puruṣottamaṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa nampi Eḻuttu . Ivai pokalūr kūttaṉ Utaiyativākaraṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai nākatevaṉ kūttaṉ vāsude vaṉāṉa nampi Eḻuttu . śrīpokalūr poṉṉampi Aṉantaceyaṉaṉ Eḻuttu . mārāyamaṅkalattu mātavaṉ tiru
varaṅkamuṭaiyaperumāḷ Eḻuttu . pokalūr Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ periyatevaṉ tiruveṅkaṭanampi Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.446 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
